mapper.insert: insert into sys_menu_change_log (menu_id, change_type, oper_by, oper_time, menu_snapshot) values (#{menuId}, #{changeType}, #{operBy}, sysdate(), #{menuSnapshot})
mapper.select: select log_id, menu_id, change_type, oper_by, oper_time, menu_snapshot from sys_menu_change_log where menu_id = #{menuId} order by oper_time asc, log_id asc
select log_id, menu_id, change_type, oper_by, oper_time, menu_snapshot from sys_menu_change_log where log_id = #{logId} limit 1
